## PR Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Base Branch Policy

- Feature/fix/chore PRs must target `develop`.
- Only `release/*` and `hotfix/*` branches may target `main`.

## Checklist

- [ ] Base branch is correct for this PR type.
- [ ] CI passes (`make gauntlet`).
- [ ] Scope is limited and reviewable.
- [ ] Relevant docs/tests updated.
